task.title: Gate broker diagnostic logs behind env flag

events.content: Default broker tracing filter to off: Default broker tracing filter to off

raw.question: Default broker tracing filter to off
raw.chosen: Default broker tracing filter to off
raw.reasoning: PTY worker stderr is parsed as stream fallback output when it is not JSON, so warn-level tracing must not be emitted unless explicitly requested.

retrospective.summary: Made broker tracing quiet by default with AGENT_RELAY_BROKER_LOG or RUST_LOG opt-in and corrected PTY tracing targets.
